---
applyTo: "**/*.md"
---
# Documentation Instructions
## Conventions
- Prefer tables, short sections, and decision lists
- Mark unknowns as `TBD` — do not invent certainty
- Distinguish clearly: confirmed decisions vs. assumptions vs. ideas
- Capture comfort, control, and performance constraints early rather than retrofitting them
## What belongs where
| File | Content |
|---|---|
| `docs/Architecture.md` | Engine choice, component breakdown, interaction model, pitfalls |
| `docs/implementation-plan.md` | Roadmap, backlog, design discussions (D1, D2, …) |
| `ideas.md` | Raw brainstorm dump — no structure required, no elaboration |
| `INSTALLATION.md` | Setup, engine prerequisites, how to run the prototype |
## Avoid
- Long narrative design docs without actionable decisions
- Engine-specific promises before the engine is chosen
- Mixing raw brainstorm notes with implementation plans
